title: Basic Fun Tonka Steel Classics |Tractor | Farm Tractor Toy, Farm Vehicle Play for Boys Girls, Children & Toddlers, Cold-rolled Steel Durable Toy 06222
features: TRACTOR TOY: This Tonka Tractor toys sturdy steel construction can withstand the rough-and-tumble farm vehicle play that kids love, and its authentic detailing is sure to delight budding farmers and tractor enthusiasts alike
STURDY CONSTRUCTION Built to last with high-quality, COLD-ROLLED STEEL construction, this tractor is ready to tackle any job on the farm.

STEEL CLASSICS: This classic yellow tractor is Tonka Tough and built to last with Cold-Rolled Steel. With a sturdy design and rugged tires, this toy tractor can handle any terrain. Perfect for indoor and outdoor play.
LARGE TRACTOR: About 11-inches long and a little over 8-inches tall, this large toy tractor is perfect for kids who love to play hard and imagine big.

CREATIVE FARM PLAY: Whether they're tending to their imaginary crops, hauling supplies around the farm, or just driving through the countryside, the Tonka Steel Classics Farm Tractor is the perfect toy for kids who love to play hard and imagine big.
description: From the manufacturer BIG AND TOUGH This large toy truck is 14-Inches long and made TONKA TOUGH with cold-rolled steel - ready to tackle any rescue job indoors or outdoors. REMOVABLE LADDER No rescue is out of reach with the removable ladder! Unlock the ladder from the side of the truck and use it to reach your rescue destination. REALISTIC DETAILS The brightly coloured decals and realistic details will spark your little one's imagination and encourage hours of interactive play. Get ready for firefighter duty and race to the rescue with the new Tonka Steel Classics Fire Rescue Truck! Mades with COLD-ROLLED STEEL, this toy truck is built to last. Kids will love the truck's bright red colouring and authentic details as they imagine racing to the aid of those in need! Makes a great gift for ades 3 and up. A rite-of-passage icon, this 17" wide truck is made with real steel, big tires that roll over anything and an articulated dump bed. With a real scooping bucket and articulated arm, this Front Loader is ready to take on the toughest of rocks, dirt, and sand. Demolish and clear away anything in this Bulldozer's path - moving dirt or sand with the articulated workable blade.
